x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Application health data enables DEX AI to diagnose app-specific issues such as Zoom quality and Office 365 performance. Without application monitoring, DEX AI diagnosis is limited to OS-level signals only.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure application monitoring in DEX for key business applications (Zoom, Office 365, browser-based apps). Application health data is required for DEX AI skills like Zoom call quality diagnosis and application performance analysis.
